title: Aerolith
description: Datapack which turns your average overworld into a not so average Skylands experience!
body:
### Aerolith: Ascend to Adventure Do you crave wide-open skies and breathtaking vistas?
Aerolith transforms the overworld into a floating archipelago, crafting a skylands adventure unlike any other!
Terralith is no longer required!
Reach out to me on the discord, I always want feedback, should I change the nether as well?
## Check out the gallery!

I also recommend adding structure mods/datapacks like [Strayed Fates](https://modrinth.com/datapack/strayed-fates-forsaken), and/or [Explorify](https://modrinth.com/datapack/explorify), and more to fill-in for the increased height and the rareness of good locations to place structures, floating villages goes well too and any water structures; I'm planning on adding some soon. 

**Huge thanks to andre_601 and blurry for the logo, you can find them in the modrinth discord**
